mnemonics.title: Servlet Lifecycle
mnemonics.content: ISD - Init, Service, Destroy (the three main lifecycle methods)

mnemonics.title: Session Tracking Methods
mnemonics.content: CUHH - Cookies, URL Rewriting, Hidden Fields, HttpSession (the four session tracking techniques)

mnemonics.title: HTTP Methods
mnemonics.content: GPPD - Get, Post, Put, Delete (common HTTP methods handled by servlets)
